title: expand_vars: to_lowercase() allocs when make_ascii_lowercase() works
description: evaluator.rs expand_vars() line ~692: ctx.variables.get(&name.to_lowercase()) where name is an owned String we just built. to_lowercase() allocates a new String. RFC 5229 §2 restricts variable names to [A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]* (ASCII identifiers), so make_ascii_lowercase() is correct and avoids the allocation: name.make_ascii_lowercase(); ctx.variables.get(&name). This is called on every ${...} expansion.
